node.text:
The only limitations we have are the ones we choose to believe in.
 
For @sbird10 and @sylvia_fowles they chose to believe anything was possible – fearlessly elevating the game while helping to pave a path for all female athletes along the way.
 
With a combined 21 All-Star selections between the two of them, congratulations to these two legends on their final All-Star weekend.
 
Never done changing the game.

node.text:
Perseverance. Drive. Virtuosity. That is what it takes to hit milestones time and time again. Take those qualities, and multiply them by 10,000.

With over 36,000 points, 10,000 rebounds, and 10,000 assists in his career, @KingJames is the first basketball player in @NBA history to reach a career triple quintuple.

Never done making history.

node.text:
Real game is never done elevating. 

With more responsive material than ever in a Nike Basketball shoe, as well as new stability and traction systems, Nike Air Zoom G.T. Jump is here to help hoopers own vertical space and do what they’ve never done before. 

🚀  Launching February 10.

@giannis_an34’s life changed overnight when he was drafted 15th by the Milwaukee Bucks. His first time in America and away from his family, Giannis found comfort through the support of Greek fans in the U.S., who always showed up to his games. #zoomfreak1 #giannis #nike

Explore more from Giannis at nike.com/basketball.

node.text:
Royalty is the standard in the city that birthed a King. 

Four teams showed up to Chosen 1’s Akron, ready to prove who’s worthy of the crown. In the end, @stvmbbk and @stvmgbk sat on the throne.

Who will Take the Crown?

From Akron to New York to LA, Nike Basketball and @kingjames are ready to see who is dedicated to greatness.

Win or hit the tunnel, difference makers only in New York.

2025-26 NBA City Edition Jerseys available now.
